Name: Cloud Infrastructure
Description: AWS, cloud hosting, and infrastructure costs

Name: Employee Stipend Expense
Description: Home-office equipment stipend reimbursements paid to relocating employees on behalf of client companies. Billable back to clients.

Name: Relocation Moving Services
Description: Vendor costs for employee relocation moving services (packing, transport, delivery)

Name: Contingent Liability - Damage Claims
Description: Accrued liability for pending insurance claims and damage assessments on client equipment transported under MoveOps coordination. Amounts remain here until insurance adjudication is complete and liability is assigned to vendor, insurer, or absorbed by MoveOps.

Name: Regulatory Compliance — DOT Penalties (Pending)
Description: Contingent liability accrual for potential DOT/PHMSA civil penalties related to hazardous materials compliance inquiry Case No. PHMSA-2026-04-1187. Accrual represents estimated exposure from potential violations under 49 CFR 107.329 (up to $59,017 per violation per day). To be adjusted or reversed upon resolution of the DOT audit.

Name: Regulatory Compliance Expense
Description: Expense account for regulatory compliance costs including DOT/PHMSA penalties, audit remediation, and related legal or administrative expenses.

Name: Claims & Remediation Expense
Description: Vendor pass-through damage claims, reimbursements, and remediation charges tied to relocation service failures.
